title: QUIC RFC 9002 PTO Timer Discipline Verification
verification_method: Focused requirement-home tests and inspection evidence from the recovery-timing, send-runtime, handshake-validation, and path-validation seams.
scope: This verification covers the RFC 9002 PTO timer discipline slice for arming, restart, backoff reset, and validation-aware pre-confirmation gating. It keeps PTO expiry as scheduler state only and does not claim probe composition, retry reset, migration path switching, or packet-loss declaration on PTO expiry.
expected_result: The runtime arms PTO from packet-space recovery state, restarts and resets PTO backoff on the supported send, acknowledgment, and key-discard transitions, suppresses pre-confirmation PTO where validation is incomplete, and leaves PTO expiration to schedule probe work without marking packets lost.
procedure: Run the requirement-home tests for the 10 targeted RFC 9002 clauses.
Inspect the recovery-timing and send-runtime helpers to confirm PTO arming, restart, and backoff reset flow through packet-space recovery state.
Confirm the validation seam gates pre-confirmation PTO without widening into probe composition or loss declaration.
preconditions: The targeted RFC 9002 requirement-home tests are discoverable by the test runner.
